Rows: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id)

gt_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) FROM molecule AS T1 INNER JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T3.bond_type = '#' AND T2.element = 'h'

Rows: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id)

pred_sql:
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) 
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'h' AND b.bond_type = '#';
question: Calculate the percentage of carcinogenic molecules with triple bonded Hidrogen atoms.
